consistency.level_and_damage: Consistent. Level 2 spell dealing 2d6 fire damage per ray.
consistency.scaling: Consistent. Additional ray per spell slot level above 2nd (e.g., 3rd level slot = 4 rays, 4th level slot = 5 rays).
consistency.casting_time_and_duration: Standard for an attack spell. 1 action, instantaneous.

quality.clarity: High. The description clearly states the action economy (3 attacks) and how scaling works.
quality.completeness: Complete. Includes all necessary mechanical details.
quality.flavor: Mechanically sound Evocation spell, fitting the name and school.

mechanics.scaling_mechanism: Additive. One additional ray per slot level above 2nd.
mechanics.range_utility: 120 feet is a respectable range for a Level 2 attack spell.

analysis.archivist_notes: A core damage/scaling spell for Sorcerers and Wizards. The mechanics are straightforward and well-defined. No data integrity issues found.
